column1: Xavier Edwards leads the slate with a strong hit probability and steady recent form, benefitting from a favorable park and a platoon edge against Kyle Freeland. Otto Lopez also profiles well in the same matchup, showing reliable season-long contact and a high rate of games with a hit. Luis Arraez offers consistency atop Arizona’s lineup, but faces a tougher pitcher and less park boost. Yandy Diaz and Bobby Witt Jr. are secondary options in less favorable spots.
